name: Candied Yams
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds yams, peeled and sliced (1/4 inch thick)
4 tablespoons unsalted butter or margarine, softened
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F. Place the yams in a 12- by 12-inch baking pan and pour in the water and vanilla extract. In a small bowl, mix together the butter, granulated sugar, light brown sugar, cinnamon, and allspice until blended. Sprinkle this mixture over the yams. Cover the baking pan tightly with foil and bake for 45 minutes.
2. Sprinkle the raisins and pineapple chunks over the yams. Return to the oven and cover the baking pan tightly with foil again. Continue baking until very tender and juices are bubbling, about 20 minutes. Serve hot from the pan.
